package rulefixtures

import (
	"strings"
)

// scenario for strings_hassuffix_manual_slice_after_len: Manual `len` and slice suffix checks instead of `strings.HasSuffix(...)`.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: performance; severity: info.
func scenario656Negative(haystack string, needle string, left string, right string) bool {
	return strings.HasSuffix(haystack, needle)
}
